mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > NOW())
SELECT * FROM system_message WHERE expire_time IS NOT NULL AND expire_time < NOW() AND is_read = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM system_message WHERE expire_time IS NOT NULL AND expire_time < NOW() AND is_read = 0
